---
title: "Home"
toc: false
---

<style>
.quarto-title-block {
  display: none;
}
</style>

:::{.hero-section}
<div class="hero-text">

# Kelvin Andikko

Welcome to my coursework website for **ISSS608: Visual Analytics & Applications**.

This website showcases the visualisations, analysis, and exercises that I have completed throughout the module. It serves as a portfolio of my learning journey in visual analytics using Quarto and R.

<div class="hero-buttons">
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/kelvinandikko/" class="custom-button secondary-button" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
</div>

</div>

<div class="hero-image">
  <img src="images/profile.jpg" alt="Profile photo" class="profile-image">
</div>
:::

## Latest Work

Here are the most recently uploaded exercises.

<div class="latest-grid">

<div class="card-link">
<a href="hands-on/exercise1.html" style="text-decoration:none; color:inherit;">
<div class="latest-card">

### Hands-On Exercise

**Latest:** Exercise 1

This exercise covers the introduction of ggplot2 and its various functions.
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="card-link">
<a href="in-class/exercise1.html" style="text-decoration:none; color:inherit;">
<div class="latest-card">

### In-Class Exercise

**Latest:** Exercise 1

A brief overview of the most recent in-class exercise and the visualisations completed.

</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="card-link">
<a href="assignments/assign1.html" style="text-decoration:none; color:inherit;">
<div class="latest-card">

### Assignments

**Latest:** Assignment 1

A brief overview of the most recent assignment and the visualisations completed.

</div>
</a>
</div>

</div>
